name: Menu_DepreciacionesInmuebkes
wl_code:
IF sIdentifier="55" THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 55, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
END
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1 THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 56, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 57, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
ELSE
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 56, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 57, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
END
ELSE IF sIdentifier="56" THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 56, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
END
ELSE IF sIdentifier="57" THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 57, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
END
END
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 56, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nElemento56 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 57, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nElemento57 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 55, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF nElemento56=0 AND nElemento57=0 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
ELSE IF nElemento56=1 AND nElemento57=1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
ELSE IF nElemento56=1 OR nElemento57=1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1
END
Local procedure Menu_DeuPub
